arts.ttl: Todd Cantwell rubs salt into Philippe Clement's wounds as he makes Blackburn feelings clear after Rangers exile
arts.sum: The playmaker has lauded his new boss John Eustace after a stormy end to his Ibrox spell under Clement

arts.ttl: Preview: Blackburn Rovers vs. West Bromwich Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Blackburn Rovers and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
